title: router-hosts Go Migration Design
summary: Design plan for migrating router-hosts from Rust to Go, preserving event sourcing, gRPC/mTLS, and K8s operator while simplifying storage to SQLite.
notes: Path (docs/plans/) and prose-heavy design/rationale structure indicate DOC. Contains a 'Key Decisions' table with ADR-like architectural choices, but Status: Draft and broad multi-decision planning scope rule out a single locked ADR. Resolved DOC over ADR because it is a migration plan, not a single accepted decision record.
